name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans Cleveland Heights, Ohio — Car title loan lender in Memphis, TN offering $100–$50,000 loans with same-day funding for borrowers with ba...
description_long:
Swift Title Loans is a car title lending operation with a physical branch at 1473 S Trezevant St in Memphis, Tennessee. The business operates under the cartitleloansla.com domain, which hosts location pages for a network of title loan offices across multiple states, suggesting an affiliate or franchise structure rather than a standalone lender. The Memphis location keeps extended retail hours — Monday through Friday 9am to 7pm and Saturday 10am to 5pm — and can be reached by phone at 1-888-903-0217 or by email at service@swiftloans.com.

Swift Title Loans provides car title loans ranging from $100 to $50,000, secured by the borrower's vehicle title. The process has three stated steps: submit an application online, receive cash while retaining use of the car, then repay the loan to have the title returned. The lender prominently targets consumers with bad credit and past bankruptcies, marketing itself as an accessible option when traditional banks or personal lenders have declined an application. Same-day funding is available for borrowers who complete their application by noon.

The $100–$50,000 loan range is broader than many competing title lenders, who often cap loans based on vehicle value at much lower thresholds. The online application is secured with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption. In-person service is available at the Memphis branch, where multiple customer reviews cite a staff member named Alfred as being patient, clear, and professional throughout the application process. Saturday hours provide flexibility for borrowers who cannot visit during the standard weekday window.

As with all title loans, the fundamental risk is vehicle repossession if repayment obligations are not met. The website does not disclose APRs, origination fees, or example repayment schedules — a material transparency gap that makes it impossible to evaluate the true cost of borrowing before speaking with a representative. Several customer reviews on the site use unusual terminology such as 'cloud-based personal loans' and 'regional finance personal loans,' which is atypical of genuine borrower accounts and may indicate SEO-optimized or manufactured testimonials. Prospective borrowers should request a full written disclosure of all fees and the annual percentage rate before signing.
pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted before noon
Accepts borrowers with bad credit and past bankruptcies explicitly
Borrower keeps and drives their car throughout the loan term
Online application protected by 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
In-person consultation available at Memphis branch
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or repayment terms disclosed on the website
Vehicle title is collateral — non-payment risks repossession
Customer reviews use atypical phrasing suggestive of SEO-stuffed or manufactured testimonials
Domain (cartitleloansla.com) does not match the Swift Title Loans brand, which may cause trust concerns
No Sunday hours; no mobile app for payment management
best_for: Memphis-area car owners who need fast cash and have been turned down elsewhere
Borrowers with bad credit or prior bankruptcies who own a vehicle outright or with equity
Consumers who need more than a payday loan but cannot qualify for unsecured personal credit
Borrowers who need a larger title loan (up to $50,000) against a higher-value vehicle
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis car owners with damaged credit who need fast cash and have no unsecured borrowing options. The main caveat is that the website discloses no rates or fees, and the unusual language in customer reviews warrants skepticism — borrowers must request a full written cost disclosure before committing.
services: Loan repayment with title return upon payoff
